spec.goal: Harden the Codex process contracts so review state is head-bound, delivery gates are repo-native, plan completion semantics are explicit, and scout-skeptic local checkpoints are standardized across source guidance.
success_criteria: review-prepare, review-request, and review-repair emit stable machine-readable result envelopes with a shared `head_sha` field for the reviewed branch state
delivery-prepare no longer hardcodes Cargo Make commands as the universal repo gate and instead documents repo-native gate discovery without placeholder fallbacks
plan-writing, plan-execution, and home/codex/AGENTS.md explicitly state that plan/1 done is plan-local and does not bypass downstream review, merge, closeout, or workspace cleanup gates
scout-skeptic and home/codex/AGENTS.md define a concrete local checkpoint fallback when child-agent fanout is unavailable or unnecessary
repo-local smoke coverage is updated to guard the new contract language
installed ~/.codex skill copies for touched skills are kept in sync with the source skill updates
constraints: Keep implementation ownership on the main thread
Edit only the touched skills, their smoke tests, and the paired home/codex/AGENTS.md guidance
Preserve the existing plan/1 and delivery/1 schema shapes unless a clarification can be expressed without changing machine-readable fields
Use clone-backed workspaces for repo edits and leave unrelated local changes in the primary checkouts untouched

tasks.title: Bind review outcomes to reviewed heads
tasks.objective: Update the review-* skills and supporting smokes so review state is explicitly tied to the head SHA that was reviewed or repaired.
outputs: Head-bound review contract language across the review skills
Smoke coverage for the new head-binding requirements

tasks.title: Generalize delivery gate discovery
tasks.objective: Replace Cargo Make hardcoding in delivery-prepare with a repo-native gate discovery contract and update its smoke coverage.
outputs: Smoke coverage that rejects Cargo Make as a universal requirement

tasks.title: Clarify plan-local completion semantics
tasks.objective: Make it explicit that plan/1 done is local to the saved plan contract and does not bypass downstream lifecycle gates in AGENTS.
outputs: Explicit plan-local done semantics in both plan skills and AGENTS
Smoke coverage that guards the clarification

tasks.title: Define local scout-skeptic checkpoints
tasks.objective: Formalize the minimum local checkpoint shape for scout-skeptic when child-agent fanout is unavailable or unnecessary, and sync AGENTS to the same language.
outputs: A standard local checkpoint checklist or artifact shape
Smoke coverage for the local checkpoint fallback

tasks.title: Sync source and installed runtime copies
tasks.objective: Keep the installed ~/.codex skill copies aligned with the touched source skills after the contract hardening changes are validated.
outputs: Updated installed skill copies that match the source edits
verification:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
pairs = [
    ('review-prepare','SKILL.md'),
    ('review-request','SKILL.md'),
    ('review-repair','SKILL.md'),
    ('delivery-prepare','SKILL.md'),
    ('plan-writing','SKILL.md'),
    ('plan-execution','SKILL.md'),
    ('scout-skeptic','SKILL.md'),
]
for skill, rel in pairs:
    src = Path('/Users/xavier/code/trusted/y/hack-ink/skills/.workspaces/chore-contract-hardening') / skill / rel
    dst = Path('/Users/xavier/.codex/skills') / skill / rel
    assert src.read_text() == dst.read_text(), skill
print('OK')
PY

tasks.title: Stabilize review result envelopes
tasks.objective: Turn the review-* head binding from prose-only guidance into a stable machine-readable output contract with fixed field names and smoke coverage.
outputs: Review skill outputs define a stable result envelope with fixed field names
Smoke coverage guards the envelope fields instead of only prose head-binding language

tasks.title: Guard new AGENTS rules in source smoke
tasks.objective: Extend the Nix source smoke so the new AGENTS contract lines for local checkpoints, plan-local done semantics, repo-native delivery gate discovery, and review head-SHA binding cannot regress silently.
outputs: Source smoke assertions for the four new AGENTS contract lines
Green source smoke that fails if any of those AGENTS lines are removed

triggers: A required contract clarification needs a schema change instead of a wording-only change
Cross-repo AGENTS guidance conflicts with the updated skill contracts
Smoke coverage exposes a contradiction that cannot be fixed without changing task boundaries

evidence: 2026-03-18: Baseline checks passed with python3 dev/skill-routing/run_smoke.py in the skills workspace and git diff --check in the nix workspace

local_checkpoint.current_theory: This review finding is a narrow drift-prevention gap and can be fixed by extending the existing nix source smoke with explicit assertions for the four new AGENTS contract lines.
local_checkpoint.contradictory_evidence: If another source smoke already covered those lines indirectly, adding duplicate assertions here would be unnecessary.
local_checkpoint.missing_evidence: Need to verify the current source smoke still passes without asserting the new lines and then turns those lines into explicit checks.
local_checkpoint.next_action: Patch the nix source smoke to assert the local checkpoint, plan-local done, repo-native gate, and review head-SHA lines, then rerun smoke and diff hygiene.
